items.title: # Plan Daily Itinerary
items.content: Create a 3-day itinerary for [City] for [Number] people, focused on [Interests]. Include [Number] activities/day, meal suggestions, and travel times. Output as a bulleted list.

items.title: # Generate Packing List
items.content: Generate a packing list for a [Number]-day trip to [Destination] in [Month/Season]. Consider [Activities] and weather. Categorize items.

items.title: # Estimate Trip Costs
items.content: Estimate a budget for a [Number]-day trip to [Destination] for [Number] adults. Include flights, accommodation, food, activities, and transport. Provide low/mid/high ranges.

items.title: # Connect With Recruiters
items.content: Write a cold DM to a recruiter on [Platform] for the [Job Title] role. Mention my experience in [Relevant Experience] and ask for a brief chat. Keep it concise and professional.

items.title: # Pitch New Clients
items.content: Draft a cold email to [Company Name]'s [Contact Person/Role]. Introduce my service, [Your Service], and explain how it solves [Their Problem]. Suggest a 15-min call. Be direct and value-focused.

items.title: # Network With Experts
items.content: Generate a polite cold email to [Expert Name] about their work on [Specific Topic]. Express genuine interest in [Specific Detail/Project] and ask if they'd be open to a brief virtual coffee chat. Be

items.title: # Script Salary Discussion
items.content: Draft a script for a salary raise discussion with my manager. I want to ask for [desired percentage/amount]. Highlight my recent achievements: [List 2-3 achievements relevant to your request].

items.title: # Research Salary Ranges
items.content: What is the average salary range for a [Your Job Title] in [Your City/Region] with [Number] years of experience? Provide data sources if possible to support your findings.

items.title: # Craft Follow-Up Email
items.content: Write a polite follow-up email to my manager, [Manager's Name], after our salary discussion yesterday. Reiterate my interest in the role and express enthusiasm for a positive outcome.

items.title: # Content Calendar Ideas
items.content: Generate 10 engaging social media post ideas for a personal brand focused on [Your Niche/Industry]. Include hooks and calls to action. Target audience: [Your Audience].

items.title: # Craft Professional Bio
items.content: Write a concise, impactful professional bio (150 words) for [Your Name]. Highlight my expertise in [Key Skills] and passion for [Your Mission]. Intended for [Platform, e.g., LinkedIn/Website].

items.title: # Networking Message Draft
items.content: Draft a personalized outreach message (2-3 sentences) to [Name/Role] at [Company]. Express interest in [Specific Area] and suggest a brief virtual coffee chat. My goal is [Your Goal].

items.title: # Task Assistant Agent
items.content: Design an AI agent for [specific task]. Define its goal, required capabilities, and output format. Detail its interaction style for a [target user] and key steps it takes.

items.title: # Research Bot Blueprint
items.content: Outline an AI agent for researching [topic]. Specify its data sources, information synthesis process, and how it presents findings. Define its persona for a [user type].

items.title: # Creative Content Creator
items.content: Develop an AI agent to generate [content type] for [purpose]. Define its persona, tone, and the steps it takes from initial input to final output. Include example prompts.

items.title: # Bullet Point Summary
items.content: Summarize the following text into 5-7 key bullet points, focusing on main ideas and essential details for [Topic]: [Paste Text Here]

items.title: # Generate Study Questions
items.content: From the following [Topic] material, generate 10 detailed study questions and their answers. Format as Q: [Question] A: [Answer]. [Paste Text Here]

items.title: # Comprehensive Study Guide
items.content: Create a detailed study guide for [Exam/Subject] covering [Key Concepts]. Include definitions, important formulas/theories, and examples relevant to [Your Learning Goal]. Use clear headings.

items.title: # Skill Breakdown Plan
items.content: Act as an expert tutor. Create a structured 5-step learning plan for [New Skill], including key concepts, resources, and practical exercises suitable for a [Beginner/Intermediate] learner.

items.title: # Explain Complex Topics
items.content: Explain [Complex Topic within New Skill] to me as if I'm a [Child/High School Student], using simple analogies and avoiding jargon. Provide 3 key takeaways.

items.title: # Practice Scenario Generator
items.content: Generate 3 realistic practice scenarios for someone learning [New Skill], focusing on [Specific Aspect]. For each scenario, include a problem and what skills are needed to solve it.
